# Cursor Docs - Feature Announcements and New Capabilities

## Core Features
- **AI Editor and Coding Agent** - Described as built to make developers "extraordinarily productive"
- **Code Understanding** - Ability to understand codebases and navigate large projects
- **Feature Planning and Building** - Automated feature creation and development assistance
- **Bug Fixing** - Automated bug detection and repair capabilities
- **Code Review** - Integrated change review functionality
- **Tool Integration** - Support for existing developer tools
- **Rapid Prototyping** - Quick prototype creation and iteration
- **Legacy Code Modernization** - AI-assisted modernization of legacy codebases

## AI Models Available
Multiple Claude models including:
- Claude 4.6 Sonnet
- Claude 4.5 Sonnet and Haiku
- Claude Opus variants (4.5, 4.6, 4.6 Fast)
- Cursor Composer models (1, 1.5, 2)
- Google Gemini support (3-series and 2.5 Flash)
- OpenAI GPT-5 series models
- Grok 4.20
- Kimi K2.5

## Specialized Tools
- **Bugbot** - Automated code review and bug detection
- **Cloud Agent** - Remote execution capabilities with self-hosted and Kubernetes options
- **Browser Tool** - Web browsing integration for agents
- **Terminal Tool** - Command execution access
- **MCP (Model Context Protocol)** - Extension and integration framework
- **Slack Integration** - Team communication integration
- **Subagents** - Specialized sub-agents for delegated tasks
- **CLI (Command Line Interface)** - Command-line reference for Cursor operations

## Enterprise & Admin Features
- Admin API for team management
- Analytics and AI code tracking APIs
- SCIM provisioning support
- Service accounts for enterprise deployments
- Compliance and monitoring capabilities
- Network configuration options

## Integrations
- GitHub, GitLab, Slack
- Linear, JetBrains, Xcode
- AWS Bedrock customization

## Use Cases
- Code understanding and navigation
- Debugging and bug fixing
- Test generation

## Documentation Categories
- Getting Started, Agent Features, Tools, Models, Integration
- Account Management, Cloud Agent, Enterprise, CLI, Developer Resources
- Use case guides for Designers, PMs, Sales Engineers, Support teams
- Language guides: Web, JS/TS, Python, Java, C#, Data Science

## Localization
English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Spanish, French, Portuguese (Brazil), Korean, Russian, Turkish, Indonesian, German

## Last Fetched
2026-04-12
